titleStmt.title: SII 23.120: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 120. (A.R. No. 120 of 1907.) Āḻvārkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Āvuḍaiyammaṉ temple—on the north wall of the central shrine

summary.p: This begins with the signature of Sundara-Pāṇḍya Kāliṅgarāyar evidently an officer of the king whose order he communicates to the Sthānikas of the temple of Narasinga-Īśvaramuḍaiya-Nāyaṉār, granting a land tax-free at Paṇṇaṅguḍi for the daily worship and offerings to the goddess consecrated as Tiruppaḷḷiyaṟai-Nāchchiyār in the temple by a Śivabrāhmaṇa by name Tiruttōḍaḻagiyāṉ. This latter was given the right of worship of the diety. The inscription is dated in the 6th year of the king under title Kōnērinmaikoṇḍāṉ. It is possible that it might refer to king Māravarman Sundara-Pāṇḍya I. Āḻvārkuṟichchi is called here by the name Kollamkoṇḍa-Pāṇḍya-chaturvēdimaṅgalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cuntarapāṇṭiyak kāliṅkarāyar Eḻuttu . tribhuvaṉaccakravartikaḷ ko neriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ kollaṅkoṇṭapāṇṭiya ccaturve
timaṅkalattu nāyiṉār naraciṅkaīśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tāṉat tārkku Ikkoyil śivabrāhmaṇaril tiruttoṭaḻakiyāṉ Innāyi ṉāṟkku tiruppaḷḷiyaṟai nācciyārāka Eḻuntaruḷu
vitta Eḻulakamuḻutu bhāgamuṭaiya nācciyāṟkku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa nittanimantaṅkaḷukku tevatāṉam Iṟaiyiliyāka Ivvakarat til brāhmaṇar kāṇiyāka kuṭutta bhāgattukku A
ṉubhavittu potukiṟa nilattopāti nilam paṇṇaṅkuṭi paṟṟile talai varicaiyil kārpacāṉam viḷaiyum nilattile Āṟāvatu pacāṉmutal candrādityavaṟ celvatākat tantu In
nilattāl varum nellum poṉṉum pala Upātikaḷum variyilum kaḻikkac coṉṉom Ippa
yāṉa nilattile certtukkoṇṭu nāṉkellaiyilum tiruccūla sthāpaṉam paṇṇuvittu kallilum �
ttoṭaḻakiyāṉukku kuṭuttom Ivaṉaikkoṇṭu Innācciyār pūjai naṭattikkoḷka .
Digital edition of SII 23.120 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
